honesty_note: This is a PLACEHOLDER catalog. Every pack below is marked "available": false and lists sting files that DO NOT EXIST yet. No real audio ships with this repo. The founder must drop license-cleared, instrumental-only stings into stings/<pack_id>/ and flip "available": true. Shipping placeholder tones as a product would be FAKE GREEN.

packs.title: Cold Open
packs.blurb: Punchy intro stings and hard-cut transitions for a show that starts with energy.

license.name: HMF Podcast Sting License
license.grant: Non-exclusive, worldwide, perpetual right to use these instrumental stings and transitions as intros, outros, bumpers, and segment breaks in your own podcast episodes and their promotional clips, including monetized shows.
permitted: Use in unlimited podcast episodes and their promo/social clips you produce
Edit, trim, layer, and fade the stings to fit your show
prohibited: Reselling, redistributing, or sublicensing the sting files as standalone audio, samples, or in another music/sting library
Registering the stings (or derivatives) with any Content ID / royalty-collection system as your own
Claiming authorship of the underlying composition
license.term: Perpetual for podcast end-products you create.
